text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Spring Fan Fest. A great number of
fans are visiting, and Smart Falcon is in high
spirits.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yaaah! ☆

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator A
text_block_list.text:
After kicking up the sand with fearsome strength,
Smart Falcon takes first in the Digging for
Treasure Dirt Race!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator A
text_block_list.text:
The cloud of sand in your wake was a sight to see!
Can you share your thoughts with us?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Sure! ☆ My goal is to take first in every race this
year! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Teio Sho in June! Please come
watch! ♪

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator A
text_block_list.text: Um... I meant about... this race...

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator B
text_block_list.text:
What a shocker! Smart Falcon is the last one to
finish, bringing the Round 'n Round Rotating Race
to a close!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator B
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! It looks like she's still dizzy! She can't even
stand! Hey, are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...Looks like the camera and shotgun mic are both in
place. This is it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
My goal is to take first in every race this year!
Come and witness the birth of a legend! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Groan... First... in every... race... ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Come... and... s—thud! ☆

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator C
text_block_list.text:
Give it up for Smart Falcon and her stirring
performance in the eating contest! She managed
to keep a big smile from start to finish!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... My stomach still feels packed to bursting
with fried rice...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It was nothing! This is a great chance to attract
tons of different fans. I need to do even more to
promote my races.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Let's see... The next contest is—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hi, Falcon. You were great out there.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I saw the eating contest just now. You seemed so
intense.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! I'm so happy you were watching! ☆ Can I
give you a hug? ♪

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, that's okay...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon and Silence Suzuka banter happily
together. As I watch their friendly antics...

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text: Hey, look over there! It's Silence Suzuka and...

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text: She's with the Silence Suzuka of the Sand!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...Hm? Uhhh... When they say, "Silence Suzuka of
the Sand"...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Are they talking about me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon has been showing "otherworldly"
strength in her recent dirt races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reminded of Silence Suzuka's overwhelming
achievements on turf, fans have taken to calling
Falcon by this new nickname.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Me? Like Suzuka?! Wooow, I'm so happy! ☆

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? But... I'm the only Silence Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Bystanders
text_block_list.text: OHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Man B
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka won't let Smart Falcon steal her
name! She's thrown down the gauntlet!

text_block_list.name: Man B
text_block_list.text:
The ultimate showdown between two different
worlds—turf and dirt! Now this'll be a sight to see!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The situation escalates quickly, and before I know
it...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hello, everybody! I'm Suzuka's roommate, Special
Week!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And I'm Falcon's roommate, Eishin Flash... coming
to you live...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, what are we doing again? I'm supposed to
participate in the next event in thirty-five
minutes.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Falco and Suzuka are about to compete over the
name "Silence Suzuka of the Sand"!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Here's how it's gonna work! The real Suzuka is
known for her speedy front running, so of course
there's only one way to settle this...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
With a lightning-fast word-chain game! Each word
has to start with the last letter of the word
before—but there's a catch! If your word ends in
the letter "n," you lose!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Excuse me, may I ask a question?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Wouldn't you agree that there can only be one
Silence Suzuka? And I'm not sure I understand the
rationale behind settling this with a game of—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All right, that does it for question time! Let's get
this show on the road!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the game begins...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: "C"... "Cleats."

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Aha! The moment I've been waiting for! That ends
in "s," so naturally I choose... "Smart Falcon"! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, that ends in "n"! Nooooo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And it's decided! Smart Falcon blunders, and
Suzuka gets to keep her name!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Um, what exactly was the point of all this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it's only due to being the original Suzuka,
but Silence Suzuka claims victory in the end.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: "K"... "Kobe Shimbun Hai."

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Another "i"? Come on!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's the third in a row! You don't mess around,
Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
There just happen to be a lot of race names
ending in "i"...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm starting to run out of—actually, I think I'm
already out of ideas! I've got nothing!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fans
text_block_list.text:
Falcooo!
You got this! Don't give up yet!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, my cute little brain! You can do this!
Don't fail me now! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! "Idoldom." Because I'm gonna rise to
the top of idoldom!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
"M"... Oh—I think I ran in a race called the...
"Mainichi Okan."

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Whoops.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And it's decided! Smart Falcon is the winner!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! ☆ Now I'm Suzuka too!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wait? Am I Suzuka?! Eh, whatever! All I know is that I'm happy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Goodness.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Falcon, about the name... It's embarrassing, so...
try not to overuse it, okay?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: S-sure thing! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hi, everyone! ☆ From now on, I'm officially the
Silence Suzuka of the Sand! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
My goal is to take first in every race this year, so
come and watch! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The showdown over the name Suzuka ends in a
victory for Smart Falcon. As a result, dirt racing
gains more attention!
